dungeon: (REALM + BOSS STREAM) ROTF — green realm boss fights; recovered Carrot God + MH Wave Controller taunts
source: video disc_MFpI_mW1jYM (317 frames, 3 transitions, 79 chat). Mostly the GREEN REALM overworld (grass + tan paths + water + central structure) with a couple dark boss arenas. Chat captured two boss taunts amid player coordination.
map: DOCUMENTED: the ROTF green REALM overworld (grass, tan dirt paths, blue water, central structure) explored throughout; plus 1-2 dark boss arenas (a red crescent arena + a green glowing boss).

bosses.name: Carrot God
taunts: Oh you finally made it, I bet you were exp[ecting]...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat, first line truncated at crop edge). A MEME vegetable boss (carrot-themed) with a smug greeting taunt — fits the ROTF meme-boss family (Cookie Monster, Uvuvwuwuwe, etc.).

bosses.name: MH Wave Controller
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat, truncated). 'MH' likely = Mad House/Mad Lab. A WAVE-CONTROLLER/spawner boss that PANICS ('No! What's happening?!') — probably its on-death or phase-break line.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) AUTOFIRE toggle setting — '[Settings] Autofire disabled!' / '[Settings] Autofire enabled!' (a hold-to-shoot autofire option). (2) Dungeon KEYS — '<Fear> i have key' (key items open dungeons). (3) Dungeon CHAINING — 'we can chain' (run dungeons back-to-back). (4) Players coordinate a wandering boss ('give him some space', 'it wanders').
uncertain: Both taunt lines truncated at the chat-box right edge (full wording not captured: 'I bet you were exp[ecting someone else?]', 'You wer[e supposed to...]'). Boss attacks/HP/drops/dungeons not isolated. 'MH' expansion ('Mad House'?) unconfirmed.
confidence: HIGH that Carrot God + MH Wave Controller are real bosses with these (partial) taunts + the Autofire/keys/chain mechanics. MEDIUM for exact full wording (truncated); LOW for dungeon mapping/drops.
